pageDescription: Create a debt payoff plan and see how long it will take to become debt-free with strategies like debt snowball and debt avalanche methods

snowball.title: Debt Snowball Method
snowball.description: Pay minimums on all debts, extra on smallest balance for psychological wins

avalanche.title: Debt Avalanche Method
avalanche.description: Pay minimums on all debts, extra on highest interest rate to save money

consolidation.title: Debt Consolidation
consolidation.description: Combine multiple debts into one loan with lower interest rate

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides debt payoff estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual payoff terms may vary based on lender policies and fees

importantNotesList: The snowball method provides psychological motivation through quick wins
The avalanche method saves more money in interest over time
Consider balance transfer offers for high-interest credit card debt
Avoid taking on new debt while paying off existing debts

messages.enterInformation: Enter your debt information to create a payoff plan
messages.resultMessage: Your debt payoff calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides debt payoff estimates based on mathematical calculations. Actual payoff terms, interest charges, and fees may vary based on lender policies and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized debt management and consolidation advice, consult credit counselors or financial advisors with expertise in debt reduction and individual financial circumstances.

errors.debtName: Please enter a valid debt name
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid interest rate
errors.minimumPayment: Please enter a valid minimum payment
errors.extraPayment: Please enter a valid extra payment amount

tooltips.debtName: Name of the debt (e.g., Credit Card, Student Loan)
tooltips.balance: Current outstanding balance on the debt
tooltips.interestRate: Annual interest rate charged on the debt
tooltips.extraPayment: Additional amount you can pay toward debt each month
tooltips.payoffStrategy: Method used to determine which debt to pay extra toward

reallocate_payments_from_paidoff_debts_t: Reallocate payments from paid-off debts to remaining debts
showing_first_24_months_download_csv_for: Showing first 24 months. Download CSV for complete schedule.
enter_your_debt_information_to_see_your_: Enter your debt information to see your payoff strategy
the_debt_avalanche_method_is_a_mathemati:
The debt avalanche method is a mathematically optimal debt repayment strategy that minimizes the
                      total interest you'll pay over time.
with_their_balances_minimum_payments_and: with their balances, minimum payments, and APRs
on_all_debts_to_avoid_penalties_39: on all debts to avoid penalties
to_the_debt_with_the_highest_interest_ra: to the debt with the highest interest rate first
redirect_all_payments_to_the_next_highes: , redirect all payments to the next highest-rate debt
monthly_interest_previous_balance_monthl: Monthly interest = Previous balance × Monthly rate
new_balance_max0_balance_after_interest_: New balance = max(0, Balance after interest - Payment)
extra_payments_are_applied_to_debts_in_o:
Extra payments are applied to debts in order of highest APR first, with balance as tiebreaker
                        (lowest first).
credit_card_a_5000_at_1899_apr_100_minim: • Credit Card A: $5,000 at 18.99% APR, $100 minimum
credit_card_b_3000_at_2499_apr_75_minimu: • Credit Card B: $3,000 at 24.99% APR, $75 minimum
apply_extra_200_to_card_b_higher_apr_99: • Apply extra $200 to Card B (higher APR)
card_b_paid_off_first_in_11_months_100: • Card B paid off first in ~11 months
reallocate_card_bs_275_payment_to_card_a: • Reallocate Card B's $275 payment to Card A
